item.title: Wizard List
item.description:
Wizards List

Source: darkpawns.com/wizlist.html
Author: R.E. Paret (Frontline)
Preserved from Wayback Machine capture

The Wizards of Dark Pawns are the designers and creators of the game. Although many people have helped shape the world of Dark Pawns over the last six years, the current staff listed below is primarily responsible for the playability of this version. Wizards are a secret lot, and very powerful. They are not to be trifled with.
